sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 14.61 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.14)

statement.latex: Determine all pairs$({ S},G)$, where$S$is a semipartial geometry and$G$is an almost simple flag-transitive group of automorphisms of$S$.
